ace_of_cups.name: Ace of Cups
ace_of_cups.reversed_meaning: emotional blockage, or love withheld from yourself
ace_of_cups.upright: the heart opening; a wellspring of feeling

ace_of_pentacles.name: Ace of Pentacles
ace_of_pentacles.reversed_meaning: a missed opportunity or a shaky foundation
ace_of_pentacles.upright: a tangible seed of prosperity and new ground

ace_of_swords.name: Ace of Swords
ace_of_swords.upright: a piercing clarity that cuts to truth

ace_of_wands.name: Ace of Wands
ace_of_wands.reversed_meaning: a false start, or scattered, ungrounded energy
ace_of_wands.upright: a pure surge of creative fire and new will

chariot.name: The Chariot
chariot.reversed_meaning: scattered force, defensiveness, or losing the reins
chariot.upright: victory through directed will and emotional self-command

death.name: Death
death.reversed_meaning: clinging to the dead form; fear of letting go
death.upright: the necessary ending that clears ground for what is next

devil.name: The Devil
devil.reversed_meaning: denial of shadow, or breaking free of an old bondage
devil.upright: facing the chains you can in fact loosen; reclaiming desire

eight_of_cups.name: Eight of Cups
eight_of_cups.reversed_meaning: fear of leaving, or aimless drifting
eight_of_cups.upright: walking away from what no longer fulfills

eight_of_swords.name: Eight of Swords
eight_of_swords.upright: a self-made cage; the door is unlocked

eight_of_wands.name: Eight of Wands
eight_of_wands.upright: rapid movement, news, and aligned momentum

emperor.name: The Emperor
emperor.upright: stable structure and protective authority you can stand on

empress.name: The Empress
empress.reversed_meaning: smothering, creative block, or neglect of your own needs
empress.upright: creative fertility, pleasure, and the power to nourish

five_of_cups.name: Five of Cups
five_of_cups.upright: grief over what spilled; learning to see what remains

five_of_pentacles.name: Five of Pentacles
five_of_pentacles.upright: hard times; help is nearer than it looks

five_of_swords.name: Five of Swords
five_of_swords.upright: a win that costs more than it gives

fool.name: The Fool
fool.reversed_meaning: recklessness, or fear that freezes the first step
fool.upright: the courage to begin before you can see the whole path

four_of_cups.name: Four of Cups
four_of_cups.upright: contemplative withdrawal; an offer not yet seen

four_of_pentacles.name: Four of Pentacles
four_of_pentacles.reversed_meaning: clinging, scarcity-thinking, or learning to let go

four_of_swords.name: Four of Swords
four_of_swords.reversed_meaning: restlessness, or avoidance of a needed pause

four_of_wands.name: Four of Wands
four_of_wands.reversed_meaning: a muted celebration or unstable foundations
four_of_wands.upright: a joyful milestone, harmony, and homecoming

hanged_man.name: The Hanged Man
hanged_man.reversed_meaning: stalling, martyrdom, or clinging to control
hanged_man.upright: the wisdom of surrender and seeing the world upside-down

hermit.name: The Hermit
hermit.reversed_meaning: isolation, lostness, or refusing needed solitude
hermit.upright: withdrawal that finds the inner lamp and lights the way back

hierophant.name: The Hierophant
hierophant.reversed_meaning: dogma, conformity, or rejecting all inherited wisdom
hierophant.upright: wisdom carried through tradition, mentorship, and shared meaning

high_priestess.name: The High Priestess
high_priestess.reversed_meaning: ignored intuition, secrets that isolate, surface noise
high_priestess.upright: trust in the inner voice that knows before it can explain

judgement.name: Judgement
judgement.reversed_meaning: self-condemnation, or refusing the call to change
judgement.upright: the call to rise, answer honestly, and become who you are

justice.name: Justice
justice.reversed_meaning: bias, avoidance of truth, or harsh self-judgment
justice.upright: clear sight, fair measure, and ownership of consequence

knight_of_cups.name: Knight of Cups
knight_of_cups.upright: the romantic on a heartfelt quest

knight_of_swords.name: Knight of Swords
knight_of_swords.upright: fast, focused, fearless action on an idea

knight_of_wands.name: Knight of Wands
knight_of_wands.upright: bold, passionate pursuit of a vision

lovers.name: The Lovers
lovers.reversed_meaning: discord, values out of alignment, choosing by default
lovers.upright: conscious choice and union grounded in your true values

magician.name: The Magician
magician.reversed_meaning: scattered energy, manipulation, or talent left unused
magician.upright: focused will turning idea into form through skill and word

moon.name: The Moon
moon.reversed_meaning: confusion lifting, or being lost in fear and projection
moon.upright: the path through uncertainty lit only by intuition and dream

nine_of_cups.name: Nine of Cups
nine_of_cups.reversed_meaning: smugness, or a wish that rings hollow

nine_of_swords.name: Nine of Swords
nine_of_swords.reversed_meaning: dawn comes; fears named and shrinking
nine_of_swords.upright: the 3am mind; worry magnified in the dark

nine_of_wands.name: Nine of Wands
nine_of_wands.upright: resilience and one more reserve of strength

page_of_pentacles.name: Page of Pentacles
page_of_pentacles.upright: a grounded student turning a dream practical

page_of_swords.name: Page of Swords
page_of_swords.upright: a sharp, curious mind hungry for truth

page_of_wands.name: Page of Wands
page_of_wands.upright: an eager spark; a free-spirited explorer

seven_of_cups.name: Seven of Cups
seven_of_cups.reversed_meaning: clarity returns; a real choice is made

seven_of_pentacles.name: Seven of Pentacles
seven_of_pentacles.upright: pausing to assess a long investment

seven_of_wands.name: Seven of Wands
seven_of_wands.reversed_meaning: overwhelm, defensiveness, giving up the high ground
seven_of_wands.upright: holding your ground against the odds

six_of_cups.name: Six of Cups
six_of_cups.reversed_meaning: stuck in the past, or idealizing it

six_of_pentacles.name: Six of Pentacles
six_of_pentacles.upright: a fair flow of giving and receiving

six_of_swords.name: Six of Swords
six_of_swords.reversed_meaning: resistance to change; baggage carried along

six_of_wands.name: Six of Wands
six_of_wands.reversed_meaning: hollow praise, fear of falling, delayed reward

star.name: The Star
star.reversed_meaning: despair, disconnection, or faith withheld from yourself
star.upright: quiet hope and renewal after the storm; trust restored

strength.name: Strength
strength.reversed_meaning: self-doubt, force where tenderness was needed
strength.upright: the quiet courage that gentles the lion rather than slaying it

sun.name: The Sun
sun.reversed_meaning: dimmed light, false cheer, or fear of one's own brightness
sun.upright: clear warmth, vitality, and the joy of being fully seen

temperance.name: Temperance
temperance.reversed_meaning: imbalance, excess, or impatience with the slow work
temperance.upright: patient blending of opposites into a third, finer thing

ten_of_cups.name: Ten of Cups
ten_of_cups.reversed_meaning: discord beneath the surface; idealized harmony

ten_of_pentacles.name: Ten of Pentacles
ten_of_pentacles.reversed_meaning: financial strain or family friction over resources

ten_of_swords.name: Ten of Swords
ten_of_swords.reversed_meaning: recovery; the only way left is up
ten_of_swords.upright: a painful ending that is also completion

ten_of_wands.name: Ten of Wands
ten_of_wands.reversed_meaning: burnout, or finally setting the burden down
ten_of_wands.upright: carrying much; near the finish but heavy-laden

three_of_swords.name: Three of Swords
three_of_swords.reversed_meaning: healing, or sorrow nursed too long

three_of_wands.name: Three of Wands
three_of_wands.reversed_meaning: delays, over-reach, or looking back instead of forward

tower.name: The Tower
tower.reversed_meaning: clinging to ruins; a collapse delayed and feared
tower.upright: the lightning that breaks a false structure to free what it caged

two_of_cups.name: Two of Cups
two_of_cups.reversed_meaning: imbalance, tension, or a connection cooling
two_of_cups.upright: mutual love and a meeting of hearts

two_of_pentacles.name: Two of Pentacles
two_of_pentacles.reversed_meaning: overwhelm; dropping one ball too many

two_of_swords.name: Two of Swords
two_of_swords.upright: an uneasy truce; a decision held in balance

two_of_wands.name: Two of Wands
two_of_wands.reversed_meaning: hesitation, fear of the unknown, plans stalling
two_of_wands.upright: bold vision and the courage to plan a larger life

wheel_of_fortune.name: Wheel of Fortune
wheel_of_fortune.reversed_meaning: resisting the turn, or blaming fate for everything
wheel_of_fortune.upright: a turning of the cycle; meeting change as opportunity

world.name: The World
world.reversed_meaning: loose ends, near-completion, or fear of finishing
world.upright: wholeness; a cycle completed and danced to its center
